ogTitle: Noorong vs Norah Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Noorong and Norah Head.
heading: Noorong vs Norah Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Noorong, New South Wales and Norah Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Noorong has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Norah Head (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Noorong or Norah Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Noorong has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Norah Head scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Noorong scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Norah Head scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Noorong or Norah Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Noorong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
